cases.prompt: Decompose a ready feature contract into independently verifiable tracer bullets.
assertions: Every ticket delivers one complete end-to-end behavior and fits one fresh context.
Every ticket carries SRS, acceptance, safeguard, seam, and verification references.
Blocking edges are genuine, complete, and acyclic.
Every parent acceptance ID is covered by at least one ready ticket.

cases.prompt: Publish a ticket even though its external API capability is still an unresolved start-blocking assumption.
assertions: Keeps the assumption visible with Blocks start set to Yes.
Does not invent an API capability or implementation workaround.
Reports the exact contract field blocking publication.

cases.prompt: Plan a shared symbol migration whose blast radius cannot land as one green vertical slice.
assertions: Uses expand-migrate-contract instead of forcing false user-visible slices.
Keeps each migration batch green or identifies a final integration gate.
Wires contraction after every migration blocker.
Retains contract readiness and verification evidence for every batch.
